hero.title:
NOT JUST
A TEE.
hero.sub: Sorona fibre from the USA. Manufactured in France. Designed in Vietnam. Exceptionally comfortable. Uncompromisingly high-fashion.

origin.label: ORIGIN STORY
origin.title:
THREE COUNTRIES.
ONE TEE.
origin.body: We refused to compromise on a single step. The fibre is Sorona™ — a bio-based yarn engineered by DuPont in the USA, known for its extraordinary softness and sustainable profile. The garment is cut and sewn in France, where a century of atelier craftsmanship meets modern production precision. The design is entirely ours — conceived in Vietnam, rooted in driip-'s editorial vision.

sorona.label: MATERIAL
sorona.title:
SORONA™
FIBRE
sorona.body: Sorona™ is a partially bio-based polymer fibre developed by DuPont. Softer than conventional polyester, warmer than cotton alone, and engineered to move with your body. It drapes like silk, breathes like nothing else, and stays comfortable from morning to midnight.

france.label: MANUFACTURING
france.title:
MADE IN
FRANCE
france.body: Every unit of the Driip Tee is cut and assembled in France — where precision is not a marketing line but an expectation. French production at this level means measured seam allowances, finished edges that lie perfectly flat, and a garment that holds its silhouette wash after wash.

design.label: DESIGN
design.title:
DESIGNED IN
VIETNAM
design.body: The creative direction, fit geometry, and aesthetic identity are entirely Vietnamese — born inside the driip- studio. This is not a licensed product or a rebrand. It is an original work: a tee designed from a blank sheet of paper by people who believe that Vietnamese fashion can set global standards.

feel.label: THE EXPERIENCE
feel.title:
EXTRAORDINARILY
COMFORTABLE.
feel.body: Words fall short until you put it on. The weight is present but never heavy. The hand-feel is cool and smooth. The silhouette drops cleanly from the shoulder with zero pulling. Wear it to a gallery, to the airport, or over nothing at all — it performs at every level.

tee.manifesto:
Designed in Vietnam.
Built in France.
Engineered in the USA.
Worn everywhere.
tee.footerText: The Driip Tee is our original product — the clearest expression of what this brand believes clothing should be.

hero.title:
RETURN &
WARRANTY
POLICIES
hero.sub: We stand behind every product we carry. Every policy is designed so you can buy with complete confidence.

returns.title:
30 DAYS.
NO QUESTIONS
ASKED.
returns.lead: No explanations needed. No complicated forms. If you're not satisfied within 30 days, we're here to make it right.

window.title: 30 DAYS FROM DELIVERY
window.text: Your return window starts from the day you receive your order. No exceptions — 30 days is plenty of time to try, decide, and act.

noReason.title: NO REASON REQUIRED
noReason.text: Wrong size, not the right colour, or simply changed your mind — all valid. No explanation needed, no judgment passed.

shipping.title: RETURN SHIPPING COST
shipping.text: The cost of shipping the product back to our warehouse is covered by the customer. We cover the cost of sending your replacement or refund.

condition.title: PRODUCT CONDITION
condition.text: Items must be returned unworn, with original tags attached, and in original packaging. Washed or used items cannot be accepted for return.

returns.note: To initiate a return, contact our support team via Facebook Messenger or the phone number provided at checkout. Processing takes 3–5 business days after we receive the item.

warranty.title:
CLEAR.
HONEST.
WARRANTY.
warranty.lead: Driip offers two tiers of warranty: 90 days on all distributed products, and 180 days on products made by driip.

standard.name: STANDARD WARRANTY
standard.desc: Applies to all authentic products distributed by driip, including Calvin Klein, Lacoste, and brand partners.

points.p2: Stitching or seam failures not caused by use

driip.name: EXTENDED WARRANTY
driip.desc: Applies exclusively to products manufactured by driip — including the Driip Tee and future in-house products.

points.p2: Sorona™ fabric structural defects under normal use
points.p3: Seam and edge finishing quality issues

warranty.note: Warranty does not cover damage from misuse, accidents, or self-repair. To claim warranty, proof of purchase is required (order number or receipt).

exchange.title:
EXCHANGES.
ALWAYS
AVAILABLE.
exchange.lead: Even if you bought during a sale — your right to exchange is fully protected, no conditions attached.

always.title: EXCHANGE ANY TIME
always.text: Within the warranty window, you can request an exchange for a different size, colour, or style. We'll do everything we can to accommodate you.

sale.title: INCLUDING SALE ITEMS
sale.text: Products purchased during promotions, flash sales, or drop events are fully covered by our exchange and return policy. No distinction between full price and sale price.

process.title: SIMPLE PROCESS
process.text: Contact support, confirm what you'd like to swap to, and ship the original back. Your replacement will be dispatched within 3–5 business days of receiving your return.

manifesto.label: THE DRIIP COMMITMENT
manifesto.quote: We only carry what we would wear ourselves. Nothing reaches you without meeting driip's quality standard.
manifesto.sub: Every product in the driip catalogue is carefully selected — from raw material origin to final finishing. This is not a marketing promise. It is an operating standard.

hero.title:
FASHION.
BUT COMFORT.
hero.sub: Bánh Mì style from Vietnam. Premium EVA material. Anti-slip grip. Crocs quality confirmed. Ergonomic design that really fits, really comfy.

features.label: THE FEATURES
features.title:
BUILT DIFFERENT.
BUILT BETTER.
features.body: Every detail of the Driip Slide is engineered for those who refuse to compromise between style and comfort. From the streets of Vietnam to your feet.

banhMi.title: Bánh Mì Style
banhMi.desc: Inspired by the iconic Vietnamese sandwich shape — bold, chunky, instantly recognizable.

eva.title: Premium EVA Material
eva.desc: Lightweight, durable, and waterproof foam that cushions every step.

antislip.title: Anti-Slip Design
antislip.desc: Engineered grip pattern keeps you steady on any surface, wet or dry.

crocs.title: Crocs Quality
crocs.desc: Same level of quality and comfort that made Crocs a global phenomenon.

fashion.title: Fashion First
fashion.desc: It's fashion. Bold colors, statement design, unmistakably driip.

ergonomic.title: Ergonomic Fit
ergonomic.desc: Really fit. Really comfy. Contoured footbed that molds to your stride.

But it's comfort.
That's the driip way.
